features: Safe & Durable: Our hot water bag is made from high-quality natural rubber and has passed harmful substance tests. While the UK standard for natural rubber content is 45%, URBZUE hot water bottle contain up to 55%, other lower-priced alternatives that often have less than 30%. Choose URBZUE hot water bottle for a safe and warm winter

Large Capacity & Leak-Proof: Our hot water bottle has a capacity of 2 liters that allows it to release heat for an long time. The cap with 4 threads for a tight seal, ensuring no leaks. The wide mouth allows for easy filling and emptying. Note: To be safe, it's recommended to fill the bottle NOLY 2/3 water and NO boiling water

Hot Water Bottle with Fluffy Cover: Our hot water bottle with strong thermal insulation performance brings you continuous warmth. And the hot water bottle plush cover feels velvety and soft to the touch, not only enhancing the tactile experience, but also evenly dispersing and releases the heat, effectively preventing from overheating and burns

Hot & Cold Dual Function: The hot water bottle with cover can be used to warm your bed before sleep, sooth muscle soreness, back pain, waist pain and arthritis, effectively alleviating abdominal pain during menstruation. Moreover, the hot water bottle can be used for cold compresses to reduce swelling and lower temperature

Heartwarming Gift for Winter: Our hot water bottle is foldable for storage and convenient for both home use and camping trips. It’s a perfect Christmas/Birthday gift for loved ones like wife, children, parents, husband, elders. In the cold winter, if there is a hot water bottle in your bed, it can improve the happiness index
